overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit urban environment at night. The character traverses elevated walkways and streets surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards, with moderate traffic and pedestrians populating the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, passing other pedestrians while digital advertisements glow on the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the ego character on the same pathway

entered.detail: raised pedestrian path with red accent strip running along the edge
metal guardrail separating walkway from the highway drop
tall structure covered in glowing digital advertisements and neon signage
busy road with multiple lanes of traffic moving below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete pedestrian walkway at night, with metal railings on the left and a busy multi-lane highway visible below on the right. Digital billboard towers covered in neon advertisements line the left side while other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass with suspended digital advertisements

events.description: camera pans left to face the highway traffic and overhead billboards, shifting focus from forward path to the cityscape

agents.ego_description: turning to look left at the flowing traffic and towering advertisements while continuing to walk

entered.detail: elevated highway crossing overhead with vehicles moving beneath
large screens hanging above the roadway displaying advertisements
sweeping on-ramp with light trails from moving vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal the sweeping highway overpass structure with suspended digital billboards hanging above the traffic. The character continues walking along the curved pathway as vehicles create light trails on the ramp below, with the metal railing now visible on the right side of the frame.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and overhead billboards, then pans across the architecture

agents.ego_description: looking up at the massive buildings and advertisements while walking slowly through the urban canyon

entered.detail: large screen displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' with a running figure graphic
advertisement showing a figure with text 'All Night. Every Night.'
illuminated green corporate signage for Trauma Team medical services
massive skyscrapers with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to take in the massive scale of the surrounding megastructures and overhead digital billboards, including a prominent 'PURE OVERKILL' advertisement. The character gazes up at the Trauma Team sign and towering skyscrapers while continuing through the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large digital advertisements

events.description: video cuts to new location on sidewalk approaching a major intersection with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking toward a busy intersection, passing pedestrians on the wet sidewalk while observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction ahead of the character toward the intersection

entered.detail: staircase leading up to building entrance on the left side of the walkway
massive screen displaying '31.1%' and 'YOUR NEIGHBOR ALREADY CALLED' with a red vehicle image
major road crossing with traffic lights and crosswalk markings
corporate logo and branding for Arasaka visible on building facade

segments.scene_description: Following a cut transition, the character walks along a wet sidewalk toward a major intersection, with concrete stairs on the left and a massive digital billboard displaying '31.1%' dominating the right side. The pavement reflects the neon lights as pedestrians walk ahead toward the crosswalk, with the Arasaka corporate logo visible on the upper right building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a neon-drenched urban canyon, moving from an elevated pedestrian walkway down into the reflective depths of a corporate intersection. It begins with the character walking along a concrete path beside a busy multi-lane highway, flanked by towering digital billboards and other pedestrians. As the camera pans left to reveal the sweeping curves of the highway overpass and the light trails of passing vehicles, the view tilts upward to capture the overwhelming scale of megastructures and prominent advertisements like Pure Overkill and Trauma Team. The scene then shifts to a wet sidewalk where the pavement reflects the vibrant city lights, moving past concrete stairs toward a major crosswalk. Finally, the perspective opens up to a massive digital display and the Arasaka corporate logo as the character approaches the heart of the intersection.
